title: agropyron repens subsp. elongatiforme
intro: Agropyron repens subsp. elongatiforme, commonly known as creeping bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting the body against free radicals. The health benefits of Agropyron repens subsp. elongatiforme include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its soothing and calming effects. Agropyron repens subsp. elongatiforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
